summary: Tested Digital Business Card feature. Backend APIs (100%) working. Frontend card page working. Business Card button in thread view NOT clickable on web.

ui_bugs.issue: Business Card button (card-outline icon) visible but NOT clickable via Playwright. TouchableOpacity in React Native Web doesn't respond to automated clicks.

integration_issues.issue: Card button icon renders but click handler not triggering modal. The button exists in code at line 564-571 with onPress handler but doesn't respond to web clicks.

issues: Call and Text quick action buttons missing (only Email visible)
Profile photo shows generic icon placeholder
6 icons visible (image, document, star, card, mic, sparkles) - all look correct

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Business Card button click handler in thread view - button visible but not responding to clicks on web. May need to use Pressable instead of TouchableOpacity or add web-specific click handling.
Add Call and Text quick action buttons to Digital Card page (currently only Email is visible)
Ensure data-testid attributes propagate to DOM for TouchableOpacity elements
critical_code_review_comments: ScrollView import was missing - fixed in thread/[id].tsx
card/[userId] route was not declared in _layout.tsx - fixed by adding explicit Stack.Screen
TouchableOpacity click handlers may not work reliably on React Native Web - consider using Pressable component instead

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Card page works, Business Card button click not working

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs verified working. Digital Card page at /card/{userId} now loads correctly after route fix. Business Card button in thread composer toolbar shows 6 icons - the 4th (card-outline) is the business card button but click doesn't trigger modal. Issue is with TouchableOpacity on React Native Web not responding to automated clicks. Manual testing may work. The Save Contact button on /card/{userId} page works correctly and triggers vCard download + campaign enrollment.
rca_of_the_issue: Business Card button click issue - TouchableOpacity component in React Native Web has known issues with automated click events from Playwright. The DOM element renders correctly (visible in screenshots) but the onPress handler doesn't fire when clicked programmatically. Potential fix: Use Pressable component with explicit onClick handler for web compatibility.
